business.address: Unit 14/16 Salpietro Street, Bibra Lake WA 6163

hero.sub: Custom steel, stainless steel and aluminium fabrication for mining, industrial and commercial projects. Designed and built in Bibra Lake, servicing clients across Western Australia.

intro.heading: A fabrication partner that delivers quality, every time.
intro.body: Based in Bibra Lake, Offer Fabrications delivers high-quality fabrication services across steel, stainless steel and aluminium for businesses that demand dependable workmanship and fast turnaround times. Whether it's a one-off component or a complete fabricated assembly, we build it properly the first time.

capabilities.heading: Fabrication capabilities
capabilities.sub: From a one-off custom part to a full production run — designed, cut, welded and finished in-house.

items.title: Custom Steel Fabrication
items.body: Mild and structural steel fabrication from light to heavy. Frames, brackets, platforms, chutes, guards and bespoke one-off components.

items.title: Stainless Steel Fabrication
items.body: Food-grade, marine and architectural stainless steel fabrication including benches, cabinets, tanks, hoppers, pipework and corrosion-resistant assemblies.

items.title: Aluminium Fabrication
items.body: Lightweight, corrosion-resistant aluminium fabrication for canopies, marine components, enclosures, panels, frames and specialised industrial applications.

items.title: CNC Cutting & Folding
items.body: Precision sheet metal processing including laser cutting, folding and forming services to produce accurate, repeatable components ready for fabrication or assembly.

items.title: MIG & TIG Welding
items.body: High-quality MIG and TIG welding across steel, stainless steel and aluminium. Built for strength, durability and clean finishes across both one-off and production work.

items.title: Production Manufacturing
items.body: Low to medium volume production runs with consistent quality, efficient workflows and repeatable fabrication processes.

feature1.heading: Steel, stainless steel and aluminium all handled in-house.
feature1.body: Offer Fabrications delivers complete fabrication solutions from concept and design through to finished products. By keeping fabrication in-house, we maintain quality, improve turnaround times and provide a seamless experience for our clients across mining, industrial, oil and gas and commercial.

points.rest: From one-off prototypes and bespoke fabrications to repeat manufacturing, every project is built with the same commitment to quality and precision.

points.strong: Built in Bibra Lake, servicing WA.
points.rest: Designed, fabricated and assembled in our Perth workshop, supporting projects throughout Western Australia.
Work directly with the team building your project, ensuring clear communication, accountability and consistent results from start to finish.

work.heading: Recent work
work.sub: Real fabrication from the Bibra Lake workshop — no stock photos, just the gear we build.

projects.heading: Our fabrication ends up where it matters.
projects.sub: Work fabricated in our Bibra Lake shop has gone on to serve some of Western Australia's biggest resource and industrial operations.
projects.note: Fabrication supplied for projects and contractors working on these sites.

feature2.body: We don't stop at the roller door.

steps.title: Enquire
steps.body: Send through your idea, drawing or photo. We'll talk materials and what's possible.

steps.title: Design & Quote
steps.body: We scope the job, recommend the right build and give you a clear, fixed quote.

steps.title: Fabricate
steps.body: Cut, formed, welded and finished in our Bibra Lake workshop to spec.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.body: Completed projects are prepared for collection or organised for transport across Western Australia.

contact.heading: Start your build
contact.sub: Tell us what you need fabricated. Send a sketch, drawing or photo and we'll come back with a quote — usually within a day or two.

ctaBanner.heading: Got a job that needs building properly?

footer.blurb: Custom steel, stainless and aluminium fabrication. Workshop-built in Bibra Lake, delivered across Western Australia.
